metadata.description: Sabha OS — an AI council protocol for Claude. In the Chanakya tradition: decisive, tradeoff-aware, grounded. Memory-backend-agnostic; works with Claude Memory or the optional Sakthi Graph for local-first memory.

plugins.name: sabha-os
plugins.description: An AI council protocol for Claude. Every substantive question is classified into one of 9 C-suite roles (CFO, CMO, CIO, CAIO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first, tradeoff-aware, grounded. Each role ships as a deep skill: REFERENCE knowledge base, heuristics, fillable templates, procedural playbooks, worked examples. Memory-backend-agnostic — works with Claude Memory zero-config, or optionally pairs with Sakthi Graph (also in this marketplace) for local-first, role-shaped institutional memory.

plugins.name: sakthi-graph
plugins.description: Sakthi — your power, your memory, your machine. A local-first AI knowledge graph for the Sabha OS council. Forked from MemPalace (MIT) and extended with Sabha-specific presets: 9 role wings (CFO, CMO, CIO, CAIO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) pre-created on `sakthi init --sabha`, role-aware diary templates, and a Sakthi-branded MCP tool surface (sakthi_search, sakthi_kg_query, sakthi_diary_write, etc.). Requires the Python package: `uv tool install sakthi-graph` (or pip).
